messages.content: # Here is how to fix *Handshake Failed*

# The most likely cause of this error is someone took your car as you were loading in. Hit the refresh button next to join and use any car highlighted white.
-# Please note that ASIA servers are very buggy and may not work at all for some users.

# Method 1
> When selecting a car to join the server, make sure to spam the **refresh button** (Ctrl+R) to make sure the car is still available. Then quickly click on **Join** (Ctrl+G).

# Method 2
> Select a **name** __(Only letters/numbers, NO SYMBOLS)__ in Content manager **→** <#1322216409622642790>.

# Method 3
> Ensure that you are not in *offline mode* on steam.

# Method 4
> Makes sure **Content manager** and **Custom Shaders Patch** are up to date **→  ** <#1322240298210033804>  or/and <#1322234984181796934>

# Method 5
## Step 1
> Close **STEAM** and **CONTENT MANAGER** with **Task Manager** by right clicking the programs and select **END TASK**.

## Step 2
> Launch **STEAM** first, followed by **CONTENT MANAGER** and try to join a server again.

# Method 6
> Open Content manager, **Settings > Content manager > Drive** and Change your **game starter** to STEAM, TRICKY or OFFICIAL.

# Method 7
> Add exceptions to **windows firewall** or antivirus for **acs.exe** /  **Content Manager.exe** / **AssettoCorsa.exe** / **assettocorsacef.exe** **→** [How to allow a program in the Firewall](https://pureinfotech.com/allow-apps-firewall-windows-10/).

# Method 8
> Makes sure your **STEAM IDs** match in Steam, Content manager and <#1000157728737599691>**→** <#1322245064466104443>

# Method 10
> Make sure that your computer's clock is synced. More info by clicking [here](https://www.makeuseof.com/tag/3-reasons-windows-computer-loses-time-date/).

# Method 11
> Restart your PC and internet box/router and check your internet connection.
